summary: Shopping List Route Enhancements testing complete. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All features working - Route button, start location dropdown with 37 options, zoomable/pannable map with zoom controls.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/routes/starting_locations - returns 36+ dockable locations - PASS
BACKEND: GET /api/routes/starting_locations - locations have required fields (id, name, system, type) - PASS
BACKEND: GET /api/routes/starting_locations - locations are dockable types (city/station/rest_stop) - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip without origin_id - backwards compatible - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with origin_id - returns reordered stops from origin - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip - different origins produce different route orderings - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip - response has complete route data for map display - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with invalid origin - handles gracefully (origin=null) - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with empty stores - returns 400 error - PASS
FRONTEND: Loadout Builder page loads with My Loadouts and New Loadout tabs - PASS
FRONTEND: Shopping List modal opens with cost breakdown - PASS
FRONTEND: Start Location dropdown visible above route map with data-testid='start-location-picker' - PASS
FRONTEND: Start Location dropdown has 37 options grouped by system (Nyx, Pyro, Stanton) - PASS
FRONTEND: Route button exists next to dropdown with data-testid='route-button' - PASS
FRONTEND: Clicking Route button with selected origin updates BOTH map AND store list order - PASS
FRONTEND: Route map has zoom-in, zoom-out, reset buttons (data-testid: zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn, zoom-reset-btn) - PASS
FRONTEND: Zoom controls work - zoom in, zoom out, reset all functional - PASS
FRONTEND: Zoom level indicator appears when zoomed (shows 77% after zoom out) - PASS
FRONTEND: Store list reorders to match route when origin selected and Route clicked - PASS

features_verified.store_list_reordering: When clicking Route with origin selected, the store list reorders to match the optimized route - Store 1: ARC-L1 (1 item), Store 2: Area18 (2 items) when starting from Levski
features_verified.route_button: Route button with data-testid='route-button' next to start location dropdown. Does NOT auto-trigger on dropdown change - requires explicit click
features_verified.zoomable_map: Route map has zoom controls: zoom-in, zoom-out, reset buttons in top-right corner. Zoom indicator shows current % when not at 100%
features_verified.pannable_map: Map supports mousedown/mousemove for pan (tested via zoom controls - no errors)
features_verified.dropdown_location: Start location dropdown is visible ABOVE the route map, not inside it

seed_data_creation: Created loadout 'Test Shopping Loadout' for Aurora CL with Cloak shield, Breton power plant, ArcticStorm cooler
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopping List Route Enhancements complete. The ShoppingListModal now manages route state with: (1) Start Location dropdown (data-testid='start-location-picker') with 37 options in 3 system groups (Nyx, Pyro, Stanton), (2) Route button (data-testid='route-button') that triggers API call and reorders both map AND store list, (3) ShoppingRouteMap with zoom/pan support - zoom controls (zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn, zoom-reset-btn), wheel zoom, click-drag pan. Zoom indicator shows current % when zoomed. Store list shows 'SHOPPING ROUTE FROM [ORIGIN]' header when origin selected.
